_note: Source of truth for deal records. Real data is gitignored (*.local.*). This is the blank schema only. Reconciled to shared/pipeline-engine.md (canonical) in P23: deal_type enum, per-deliverable FTC, compensation, usage_rights, exclusivity, and invoice states now match the engine. account_ref replaces account_id; quality_verdict replaces quality_gate_result. contract_ref links to a record in pipeline/contracts/; raw contract_text lives only in the .local file, never committed. P30 (v0.3.0, additive): invoices are standalone records in pipeline/finance/ referenced by invoice_refs[]; the embedded invoice object is a denormalized summary of the most recent invoice record, kept for radar and quick reads. payment_terms stays free text as received; payment_terms_structured is the computable sibling filled only from quoted evidence per shared/finance-engine.md (never inferred). revenue_share, commission, and ip_license_fee model the money side of those clauses; duties with dates (reporting cadences, renewals) go to the obligation register.
stage: identified | outreach-sent | in-discussion | contract-negotiating | signed | in-production | delivered | invoiced | closed/fulfilled | archived

invoice.status: draft | sent | viewed | paid | overdue | disputed
